title: epipactis xanthophaea
intro: Epipactis xanthophaea, also known as the yellow form of the Helleborine orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Epipactis xanthophaea is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its potential medicinal properties.
